narrative:
Cols 74-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 921 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
